title: Jewish PVP Textures
description: A PvP-focused Minecraft texture pack with custom swords, tools, items, and particles designed for better clarity and visibility in combat.
body:
Jewish PvP Textures is a Minecraft Java Edition PvP texture pack designed to improve combat clarity while keeping a clean, themed visual style.

This pack includes custom textures for commonly used PvP items and UI elements, making them easier to recognize at a glance during fights.

Features:

- Custom Netherite sword and axe textures
- Redesigned golden apples and enchanted golden apples
- Custom ender pearl texture
- Custom bottle o’ enchanting texture
- Custom totem of undying texture
- Modified critical hit particles with a bluish tint for better visibility
- Custom crosshair redesigned as a Star of David

The pack is lightweight, does not affect performance, and is intended for players who want a distinct but functional PvP look.

Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.6.

If you use this pack in videos or posts, credit is appreciated.
